languages.text: {n}На мгновение вам кажется, что в опустошенных болью глазах человека мелькает живая эмоция — что-то вроде крайнего удивления.{/n}
{n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the person's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На мгновение вам кажется, что в опустошенных болью глазах человека мелькает живая эмоция — что-то вроде крайнего удивления.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the person's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}
{n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the patient's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}
{n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the patient's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一瞬、苦痛に蝕まれた患者の目に、鮮烈な感情の火花が走ったように思える――それは極度の驚愕に近い。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the patient's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一瞬、苦痛に蝕まれた患者の目に、鮮烈な感情の火花が走ったように思える――それは極度の驚愕に近い。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'espace d'un instant, vous avez l'impression de voir une vive lueur d'émotion dans la douleur qui ravage les yeux de l’individu, quelque chose qui s'apparente à une immense surprise.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the person's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'espace d'un instant, vous avez l'impression de voir une vive lueur d'émotion dans la douleur qui ravage les yeux de l’individu, quelque chose qui s'apparente à une immense surprise.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir an için şahsın acıdan perişan olmuş gözlerinde bir canlılık kıvılcımı çaktığını düşünüyorsun. Aşırı şaşkınlığa benzer bir duygu bu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the person's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir an için şahsın acıdan perişan olmuş gözlerinde bir canlılık kıvılcımı çaktığını düşünüyorsun. Aşırı şaşkınlığa benzer bir duygu bu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment glaubst du einen Anflug eines Gefühls in den schmerzverzerrten Augen der Person zu erkennen ... eines Gefühls, das extremer Überraschung gleicht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the person's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment glaubst du einen Anflug eines Gefühls in den schmerzverzerrten Augen der Person zu erkennen ... eines Gefühls, das extremer Überraschung gleicht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Por un momento, te parece ver un destello de emoción vívida en los ojos llenos de dolor de esta persona, algo similar a la sorpresa extrema.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the person's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Por un momento, te parece ver un destello de emoción vívida en los ojos llenos de dolor de esta persona, algo similar a la sorpresa extrema.{/n}

languages.text: {n}刹那间，你似乎在那人饱受痛苦摧残的眼中看到了一丝鲜活的情感闪烁——类似于极度的惊讶。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, you think there is a flicker of vivid emotion in the person's pain-ravaged eyes — something akin to extreme surprise.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}刹那间，你似乎在那人饱受痛苦摧残的眼中看到了一丝鲜活的情感闪烁——类似于极度的惊讶。{/n}
